verses.latin_vulgate: Audite hæc, omnes gentes ;  auribus percipite, omnes qui habitatis orbem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ־זֹ֭את כׇּל־הָעַמִּ֑ים הַ֝אֲזִ֗ינוּ כׇּל־יֹ֥שְׁבֵי חָֽלֶד׃
verses.king_james: Hear this, all ye people; give ear, all ye inhabitants of the world:

verses.latin_vulgate: quique terrigenæ et filii hominum,  simul in unum dives et pauper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־בְּנֵ֣י אָ֭דָם גַּם־בְּנֵי־אִ֑ישׁ יַ֝֗חַד עָשִׁ֥יר וְאֶבְיֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Both low and high, rich and poor, together.

verses.latin_vulgate: Os meum loquetur sapientiam,  et meditatio cordis mei prudentiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: פִּ֭י יְדַבֵּ֣ר חׇכְמ֑וֹת וְהָג֖וּת לִבִּ֣י תְבוּנֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: My mouth shall speak of wisdom; and the meditation of my heart shall be of understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inclinabo in parabolam aurem meam ;  aperiam in psalterio propositionem meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַטֶּ֣ה לְמָשָׁ֣ל אׇזְנִ֑י אֶפְתַּ֥ח בְּ֝כִנּ֗וֹר חִידָתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: I will incline mine ear to a parable: I will open my dark saying upon the harp.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cur timebo in die mala ?  iniquitas calcanei mei circumdabit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֣מָּה אִ֭ירָא בִּ֣ימֵי רָ֑ע עֲוֺ֖ן עֲקֵבַ֣י יְסוּבֵּֽנִי׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore should I fear in the days of evil, when the iniquity of my heels shall compass me about?

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui confidunt in virtute sua,  et in multitudine divitiarum suarum, gloriantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַבֹּטְחִ֥ים עַל־חֵילָ֑ם וּבְרֹ֥ב עׇ֝שְׁרָ֗ם יִתְהַלָּֽלוּ׃
verses.king_james: They that trust in their wealth, and boast themselves in the multitude of their riches;

verses.latin_vulgate: Frater non redimit, redimet homo :  non dabit Deo placationem suam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֗ח לֹא־פָדֹ֣ה יִפְדֶּ֣ה אִ֑ישׁ לֹא־יִתֵּ֖ן לֵאלֹהִ֣ים כׇּפְרֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: None of them can by any means redeem his brother, nor give to God a ransom for him:

verses.latin_vulgate: et pretium redemptionis animæ suæ.  Et laborabit in æternum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְ֭יֵקַר פִּדְי֥וֹן נַפְשָׁ֗ם וְחָדַ֥ל לְעוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: (For the redemption of their soul is precious, and it ceaseth for ever:)

verses.latin_vulgate: et vivet adhuc in finem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיחִי־ע֥וֹד לָנֶ֑צַח לֹ֖א יִרְאֶ֣ה הַשָּֽׁחַת׃
verses.king_james: That he should still live for ever, and not see corruption.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non videbit interitum,  cum viderit sapientes morientes :  simul insipiens et stultus peribunt.  Et relinquent alienis divitias suas,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י יִרְאֶ֨ה ׀ חֲכָ֘מִ֤ים יָמ֗וּתוּ יַ֤חַד כְּסִ֣יל וָבַ֣עַר יֹאבֵ֑דוּ וְעָזְב֖וּ לַאֲחֵרִ֣ים חֵילָֽם׃
verses.king_james: For he seeth that wise men die, likewise the fool and the brutish person perish, and leave their wealth to others.

verses.latin_vulgate: et sepulchra eorum domus illorum in æternum ;  tabernacula eorum in progenie et progenie :  vocaverunt nomina sua in terris suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קִרְבָּ֤ם בָּתֵּ֨ימוֹ ׀ לְֽעוֹלָ֗ם מִ֭שְׁכְּנֹתָם לְד֣וֹר וָדֹ֑ר קָרְא֥וּ בִ֝שְׁמוֹתָ֗ם עֲלֵ֣י אֲדָמֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Their inward thought is, that their houses shall continue for ever, and their dwelling places to all generations; they call their lands after their own names.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et homo, cum in honore esset, non intellexit.  Comparatus est jumentis insipientibus,  et similis factus est illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָדָ֣ם בִּ֭יקָר בַּל־יָלִ֑ין נִמְשַׁ֖ל כַּבְּהֵמ֣וֹת נִדְמֽוּ׃
verses.king_james: Nevertheless man being in honour abideth not: he is like the beasts that perish.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc via illorum scandalum ipsis ;  et postea in ore suo complacebunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֣ה דַ֭רְכָּם כֵּ֣סֶל לָ֑מוֹ וְאַחֲרֵיהֶ֓ם ׀ בְּפִיהֶ֖ם יִרְצ֣וּ סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: This their way is their folly: yet their posterity approve their sayings. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sicut oves in inferno positi sunt :  mors depascet eos.  Et dominabuntur eorum justi in matutino ;  et auxilium eorum veterascet in inferno a gloria eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּצֹּ֤אן ׀ לִ֥שְׁא֣וֹל שַׁתּוּ֮ מָ֤וֶת יִ֫רְעֵ֥ם וַיִּרְדּ֘וּ־בָ֤ם יְשָׁרִ֨ים ׀ לַבֹּ֗קֶר (וצירם) [וְ֭צוּרָם] לְבַלּ֥וֹת שְׁא֗וֹל מִזְּבֻ֥ל לֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Like sheep they are laid in the grave; death shall feed on them; and the upright shall have dominion over them in the morning; and their beauty shall consume in the grave from their dwelling.

verses.latin_vulgate: Verumtamen Deus redimet animam meam de manu inferi,  cum acceperit me.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַךְ־אֱלֹהִ֗ים יִפְדֶּ֣ה נַ֭פְשִׁי מִֽיַּד־שְׁא֑וֹל כִּ֖י יִקָּחֵ֣נִי סֶֽלָה׃
verses.king_james: But God will redeem my soul from the power of the grave: for he shall receive me. Selah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ne timueris cum dives factus fuerit homo,  et cum multiplicata fuerit gloria domus ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַל־תִּ֭ירָא כִּֽי־יַעֲשִׁ֣ר אִ֑ישׁ כִּי־יִ֝רְבֶּ֗ה כְּב֣וֹד בֵּיתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Be not thou afraid when one is made rich, when the glory of his house is increased;

verses.latin_vulgate: quoniam, cum interierit, non sumet omnia,  neque descendet cum eo gloria ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י לֹ֣א בְ֭מוֹתוֹ יִקַּ֣ח הַכֹּ֑ל לֹֽא־יֵרֵ֖ד אַחֲרָ֣יו כְּבוֹדֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: For when he dieth he shall carry nothing away: his glory shall not descend after him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia anima ejus in vita ipsius benedicetur ;  confitebitur tibi cum benefeceris ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־נַ֭פְשׁוֹ בְּחַיָּ֣יו יְבָרֵ֑ךְ וְ֝יוֹדֻ֗ךָ כִּי־תֵיטִ֥יב לָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Though while he lived he blessed his soul: and men will praise thee, when thou doest well to thyself.

verses.latin_vulgate: Introibit usque in progenies patrum suorum ;  et usque in æternum non videbit lumen.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּ֭בוֹא עַד־דּ֣וֹר אֲבוֹתָ֑יו עַד־נֵ֝֗צַח לֹ֣א יִרְאוּ־אֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: He shall go to the generation of his fathers; they shall never see light.

verses.latin_vulgate: Homo, cum in honore esset, non intellexit.  Comparatus est jumentis insipientibus,  et similis factus est illis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָדָ֣ם בִּ֭יקָר וְלֹ֣א יָבִ֑ין נִמְשַׁ֖ל כַּבְּהֵמ֣וֹת נִדְמֽוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Man that is in honour, and understandeth not, is like the beasts that perish.
